title: marumia stellulata
intro: Marumia stellulata, also known as the starry marumia, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Marumia stellulata are attributed to its leaves, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of pain and infections. The herbal preparations of Marumia stellulata include infusion, decoction, and poultice, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
